issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1228: remaining Python asset sweep 8/10

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1228 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
